title: Incorrect handling of post-decrement operation in `always_comb`
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.53+70 (git sha1 3ef4c91c3, g++ 12.2.0-14+deb12u1 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

```sv
module expr_postsub_comb (
    input logic [7:0] in_val_m2,
    input logic [7:0] sub_val_m2,
    output logic [7:0] out_diff_m2,
    output logic [7:0] var_out_m2
);
    logic [7:0] var_m2;
      always_comb begin
        var_m2 = in_val_m2;
        out_diff_m2 = (var_m2--) - sub_val_m2;
        var_out_m2 = var_m2;
      end
endmodule
```

sythesize with `yosys -p "read_verilog -sv expr_postsub_comb.sv ; proc; opt ; write_verilog -sv -noattr synth.sv"`

simulate with these values as input
```
  in_val_m2 = ff
  sub_val_m2 = 11
```


### Expected Behavior

output of `out_diff_m2` should be `238`

### Actual Behavior

output of `out_diff_m2` is in fact `236`
